rect.title: Instructions to handle bag from airline to handler Occurs: [1,1]
Active segment of bag journey including relevant details Type: BagSegmentType Occurs: [1,1]
A piece of luggage associated with a passenger, packed for traveling, and necessary or appropriate in connection with a journey. Type: BagType Occurs: [1,1]
A small piece of paper, fabric, plastic or similar material attached to an bag and giving information about it. Type: BagTagType Occurs: [1,1]
Baggage identifier used for internal usage only (typically used as Julian date on 3 numeric) Type: AirlineBagRefID_Type Occurs: [0,1]

Baggage tag issuer codes, combined with the tag serial number, are used to identify each piece of checked luggage through all baggage handling processes. Refer to Resolution 769 Bag Tag Issuer Codes Type: BagTagIssuerCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
An organization which acts on behalf of another. Type: AgencyType Occurs: [0,1]
Code of the agency organization. Type: AgencyCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
A Role of an individual person to be a staff of an agency. Type: AgentCollapsedType Occurs: [0,1]
An organization which acts on behalf of another. Type: AgencyType Occurs: [0,1]
Code of the agency organization. Type: AgencyCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
Identifier of an agent as assigned by his/her agency. Type: ID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
A personal name given to the individual at birth and used before a family name. Also called first name. E.g. JOHN. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,5]
Individual's hereditary name(s) common to all members of a family. Also known as family name or last name. E.g. SMITH. Excludes any potential suffix. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,1]
A device for printing text or pictures or barcodes, especially one linked to a computer. Type: PrinterType Occurs: [0,1]
Identifier of the device. Type: ID_Type Occurs: [1,1]
A Role of an individual person to be a staff of an agency. Type: AgentCollapsedType Occurs: [0,1]
An organization which acts on behalf of another. Type: AgencyType Occurs: [0,1]
Code of the agency organization. Type: AgencyCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
Identifier of an agent as assigned by his/her agency. Type: ID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
A personal name given to the individual at birth and used before a family name. Also called first name. E.g. JOHN. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,5]
Individual's hereditary name(s) common to all members of a family. Also known as family name or last name. E.g. SMITH. Excludes any potential suffix. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,1]
With Bag Tag Serial Number Code a Bag Tag Issuer may identify bags of her interest. See Resolution 740 Interline Bag Tag Type: BagTagSerialNumberID_Type Occurs: [1,1]
Unique Transponder identifier, known as TID for Transponder identification Type: TransponderID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
With Bag Tag Usage Code a Bag Tag Issuer may differentiate use of the tag. See Resolution 740 Section 3 Use of Tags Type: BagTagUsageCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
A set of measurable extents of a particular bag, such as length, or height or width. Type: BagDimensionsType Occurs: [0,1]
A measurement or extent of something from end to end Type: LengthMeasureType Occurs: [0,1]
A measurement or extent of something from end to end Type: LengthMeasureType Occurs: [0,1]
A measurement or extent of something from end to end Type: LengthMeasureType Occurs: [0,1]
A single human being as distinct from a group, class, or family. Type: IndividualType Occurs: [0,1]
A personal name given to the individual at birth and used before a family name. Also called first name. E.g. JOHN. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,5]

A Bag is owned by an individual who may take role of either passenger or crew member for a given bag segment. In this case, the presence/absence of CREW exception code will tell for each Bag Segment which of the two applies. Type: RoleType Occurs: [0,1]
Individual's hereditary name(s) common to all members of a family. Also known as family name or last name. E.g. SMITH. Excludes any potential suffix. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,1]
A word such as Mr., Mrs., Miss or Dr that is used before an individual's name to indicate the gender, profession or marital status. Type: SupplementNameType Occurs: [0,1]
A set of properties used to characterize a bag, such as weight, color. Type: BagPhysicalPropertiesType Occurs: [0,1]
Descriptive code of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b baggage type codes. Type: BaggageTypeCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Basic code of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b basic element codes. Type: BagBasicCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Color of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b color codes. Type: BagColorCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Descriptive picture of physical property measurement. Type: URI_Type Occurs: [0,1]
External feature of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b external element codes. Type: BagExternalFeatureCodeType Occurs: [0,5]
Material code of the physical property measurement. Refer to resolution 743b description codes. Type: BagMaterialCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Allowance for Weight for a single Bag Type: WeightMeasureType Occurs: [0,1]
A measurement of the heaviness of a bag. Only checked weight supported. Type: WeightMeasureType Occurs: [0,1]
A series of tasks or steps taken in order to achieve a particular end in the context of baggage logistics. Type: BaggageProcessType Occurs: [1,1]
A Role of an individual person to be a staff of an agency. Type: AgentCollapsedType Occurs: [0,unbounded]
An organization which acts on behalf of another. Type: AgencyType Occurs: [0,1]
Code of the agency organization. Type: AgencyCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
Identifier of an agent as assigned by his/her agency. Type: ID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
A personal name given to the individual at birth and used before a family name. Also called first name. E.g. JOHN. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,5]
Individual's hereditary name(s) common to all members of a family. Also known as family name or last name. E.g. SMITH. Excludes any potential suffix. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,1]

A thing that happens in context of baggage logistics. That is a completion and / or commencement of a change, or the outcome of a change, or the arrival of a pre-determined point in time. Specifically, not a thing that takes place. Type: BaggageEventType Occurs: [1,1]
Actual date and time of the activity. Type: DateTimeType Occurs: [0,1]
Event Trigger Qualifier as per RP1745 section 2 .R Augmented Internal Airline Data Type: EventTriggerCodeType Occurs: [0,1]

An infrastructure (such as an airfield) that is built, installed, or established to serve a particular purpose Examples: an aircraft stand, a baggage cart, a gate, a high loader Type: FacilityType Occurs: [1,1]
A classification of Facility according to Facility Type Type: BaggageFacilityTypeType Occurs: [0,1]
Codification of type Type: BaggageFacilityTypeCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
Identifies facility according to local conventions Type: ID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
A location with a spatial attribute, probably on the surface of the earth. For example: Longitude and Latitude Type: GeospatialLocationType Occurs: [0,1]
The number of the spatial location point elevation. Type: NumberType Occurs: [0,1]
The number of the spatial location point latitude. Type: NumberType Occurs: [0,1]
The number of the spatial location point longitude. Type: NumberType Occurs: [0,1]
Names e.g. A12 Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [0,1]
A natural or physical address used for postal service. May be a building address, airport address, etc. Type: PostalAddressType Occurs: [0,1]
Additional address information including building name, room, apartment, or suite number. Type: TextType Occurs: [0,1]
A City (e.g., Dublin), town, or postal station (i.e., a postal service territory, often used in a military address, or metropolitan area) Type: CityType Occurs: [0,1]
The name, expressed as text, of the city, town or village. Type: ProperNameType Occurs: [1,1]
Used to differentiate multiple Postal Addresses of one contact. For example: AddressAtOrigin or AddressAtDestination. Type: TextType Occurs: [0,1]
Post office box. For example: P.O. Box 21. Type: CodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Postal code. For example: 11001, 11001-2345. Type: CodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Street name and number. For example: Main Street, 100 Main Street. Type: TextType Occurs: [0,2]
A Location or facility where air or surface transportation originates, stops and/or terminates, and where passengers and/or cargo can be taken on or off. Type: StationType Occurs: [1,1]
IATA defined code identifying a city or station. Type: IATA_LocationCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
A device that scans objects and converts them into or extracts digital data. E.g. document scanner, barcode reader, biometric scanner. Type: ScannerType Occurs: [0,1]
Identifier of the technology device. Type: ID_Type Occurs: [1,1]

Top level baggage process name. Distinguishes between Local departing baggage (L), Transfer arriving baggage (F), Transfer departing baggage (T), and Terminating arriving baggage (X) Type: BaggageProcessCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
Secondary level baggage process naming Follows baggage journey (bag, cart, ULD) Type: BaggageSubProcessCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Tertiary level of baggage process identification Reports the task level Type: BaggageSubSubProcessCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Description of the process Type: TextType Occurs: [0,1]

A collapsed view on an operation between board point and any subsequent off point within the same flight designator. Could be one or more legs. Could also be used for other transport vehicles such as train or bus etc. Type: DatedOperatingSegmentCollapsedType Occurs: [1,1]
Scheduled date and time of departure of the aircraft at the terminal or departure gate at an airport. Type: DateTimeType Occurs: [0,1]
IATA defined code identifying a city or station. Type: IATA_LocationCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
Code of the terminal infrastructure facility, as defined by IATA SSIM Appendix D. For example: '2W'. Type: IATA_TerminalCodeType Occurs: [0,1]

ICAO-defined 3-character code or IATA-defined 2-character code assigned to the carrier. For example: BA is British Airways PLC, 2C is SNCF and is also CMA CGM Air Cargo. Type: AirlineDesigCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
IATA defined code identifying a city or station. Type: IATA_LocationCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
Code of the terminal infrastructure facility, as defined by IATA SSIM Appendix D. For example: '2W'. Type: IATA_TerminalCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
(UTC) date of the scheduled aircraft departure from the station of origin. Type: DateType Occurs: [0,1]
Numerical designation of a flight as it is operated by a carrier. Type: FlightNumberTextType Occurs: [1,1]

from SIX XSD: Alphabetical character following a flight number assigned for operational purposes. SSIM: A code assigned by the administrating carrier for operational purposes. Type: OperationalSuffixTextType Occurs: [0,1]
Code of change indicator. Type: ChangeIndCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Code used to identify a particular Reservations Booking Designator. For example: P, J, W, M. Type: RBD_CodeType Occurs: [0,1]
A collection reports when an item is (planned to be) collected at a facility potentially using a vehicle Type: CollectionType Occurs: [0,1]
Earliest or targetted time for collection Type: DateTimeType Occurs: [0,1]

Identifier for Loyalty Program tier Level. Example: GOLD Type: CodeType Occurs: [0,1]

A space designated within a hold that can be containerized/palletized or not. Type: HoldCompartmentType Occurs: [0,1]

Identifies a compartment within a hold (compartment no). As per AHM505, compartments are numbered from 1 to 6. A second figure can indicate a section in a compartment starting from the front to the back and from right to left. Type: HoldCompartmentID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
Identifies a hold within a deck. Typical values include FWD (forward), AFT, BULK, MAIN (deck). Type: HoldID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
For airline to determine its use and meaning in extension of standard Type: InternalAirlineDataTextType Occurs: [0,10]
This is the sequence number in which the baggage item was loaded into the stowage device. Type: OrdinalType Occurs: [0,1]
bag is packed into either ULD or Cart Type: PackIntoType Occurs: [0,1]
A set of outcomes of applying Segment Security Controls to Baggage Process Type: SegmentSecurityOutcomesType Occurs: [0,1]
The indicator of whether a container is sealed. Type: IndType Occurs: [0,1]
Free text (1 to 38 a/n Characters) Type: ScreeningCommentTextType Occurs: [0,1]
Identifier, as defined by the manufacturer or airport, of the machine that has undertaken the screening activity and determined the screening result. Type: ID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
The result qualifier, identifying the entity that generated the Security Screening Result Type: SecurityScreeningEntityID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
Code of the function interaction screening method. Type: ScreeningMethodCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
An Event that occurs spontaneously about a bag, and to which the organization is required to respond. Type: BaggageIncidentType Occurs: [0,1]
Identifier of the incident. Type: ID_Type Occurs: [1,1]
Code of the screening alarm. Type: ScreeningAlarmCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Code of the bag screening result status. Type: SecurityScreeningStatusCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Security Number as per RP1739 Type: SecurityControlNumberType Occurs: [0,1]
A set of principles or procedures according to which something is done on a particular segment of travel. Type: SegmentSecurityControlsType Occurs: [0,1]
The authority to load indicator of the security control. An authority security control is an official permission; sanction from a security context. Type: IndType Occurs: [0,1]
The authority to transport indicator of the security control. An authority security control is an official permission; sanction from a security context. Type: IndType Occurs: [0,1]
A request by the airline to delete or mark as deleted the record for this bag as no longer expected for the flight. Type: BagDeleteRequestIndType Occurs: [0,1]
A request by the airline to unload a loaded bag, Should be set with the authorization to load set to NO. Type: BagRemovalRequestIndType Occurs: [0,1]
Determines whether bag is authorized to load Type: BagTagStatusCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
A transportation of a passenger on a Dated Operating Segment. Type: PaxSegmentType Occurs: [0,1]
The code of the passenger's boarding status. Type: BoardingStatusCodeType Occurs: [1,1]
This is the check in sequence number for a passenger on a passenger segment Type: OrdinalType Occurs: [0,1]

A code which identifies an exception to being able to allocate a seat to the passenger pre gate. Used in the boarding pass to optionally specify 'GATE' or 'STBY' if a seat has not been allocated. If a seat row and column have been specified then this attributes content would not be populated on the boarding pass. Type: SeatAllocationExceptionCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
The seat number of this service offer. Not filled in when jump seat, which is identified through the Baggage Segment Exception. Type: SeatID_Type Occurs: [0,1]
Indicates a passenger may be subject to more extensive security check and is at increased risk to no-show for flight. Type: IndType Occurs: [0,1]
The Screening Instruction of the security control. Security instruction control is a security control or a direction or order in a security context. Type: ScreeningInstructionCodeType Occurs: [0,1]
Payload information for this notification message. Type: dsig:SignatureType Occurs: [0,1]
